metadata.note: Tests MCP detection paths for FalkorDB, MongoDB, Postgres. Evals 1-4 inherited from iteration-2 at 100%. Run /lqc-tokens:eval to populate this file.

delta_from_pre_baseline.note: Populate by running evals 5-7 with /skill-creator:skill-creator and comparing to benchmark-pre.json. Key metric: token cost of MCP path vs Python path (1 tool call vs 3+ tool calls per query).
